Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX stalls as investors eye Iran tensions
news.snippet: Australian shares closed flat as investors held back ahead of a Middle East ceasefire deadline, with energy stocks falling and banks delivered mixed results.

news.title: ASX falls as war uncertainty lingers; BHP gains on China breakthrough, Cochlear plummets
news.snippet: The ASX opened lower as Middle East uncertainty hovers over markets. BHP gains after ending its China stand-off, while Cochlear tanks after profit warning.

news.title: Big Hits - New Murchison Gold, Golden Horse Minerals and SQX Resources
news.snippet: Bulls N’ Bears Big Hits looks at notable intercepts reported last week to the ASX by New Murchison Gold, Golden Horse Minerals and SQX Resources.

news.title: ‘Nothing more than a tax hike’: Harsh budget call as Chalmers urged to raise GST, cut income taxes
news.snippet: A top economist has delivered a harsh verdict on Jim Chalmers’ budget plans as the Treasurer plots a crackdown on “intergenerational unfairness”.

news.title: ‘Theft’: Brutal swipe as debt nears $1 trillion
news.snippet: The Coalition has taken an unconventional approach in its latest attack on Labor’s management of the Australian economy.

news.title: ‘Forever’: Massive claim about gas tax
news.snippet: A 25 per cent tax on Australia’s gas exports could fund free public transport in the country “forever”, a former leader has claimed.

news.title: A $50 billion NDIS is proving too tempting for Australia’s rich-listers
news.snippet: One NDIS business recorded a 45 per cent revenue jump last financial year and could become the first $1 billion disability business to list on the ASX.

news.title: True North launches high-powered surveys to grow QLD copper find
news.snippet: True North Copper has fired up the geophysics at its Mt Oxide project in QLD, in a bid to expand its emerging Aquila copper discovery and generate all-new drill-ready targets.

news.title: Aussies warned about the nation’s reliance on the Strait of Malacca as tanker traffic plummets
news.snippet: A stunning map that shows just how close we are to Asia’s busiest trade route. But as oil shipments through the waterway collapse, experts have sounded the alarm.

news.title: Group says site of new Orange greyhound track should be for housing
NSW welcomes back superstar, hands Origin debut to Dragons gun
Jackie O left ‘psychologically unwell, humiliated’ by Sandilands’ alleged bullying
news.snippet: The details of a letter from her lawyers have been revealed for the first time, outlining the effects that alleged ongoing bullying from her co-host Kyle Sandilands had on her.
